CREATE TABLE test_strings (id UInt32, haystack String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (1, 'hello world'), (2, 'goodbye world'), (3, 'hello goodbye'), (4, 'world hello');
SELECT replaceAll(haystack, 'world', 'universe') AS modified_haystack FROM test_strings;
SELECT id, replaceAll(haystack, 'good' , 'bad') AS modified_haystack FROM test_strings WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_strings WHERE haystack LIKE '%world%');
CREATE TABLE replacement_strings (pattern String, replacement String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY pattern;
SELECT ts.id, replaceAll(ts.haystack, rs.pattern, rs.replacement) AS final_haystack FROM test_strings ts JOIN replacement_strings rs ON ts.haystack LIKE '%' || rs.pattern || '%';
SELECT id, replaceAll(replaceAll(haystack, 'goodbye', 'bye'), 'hello', 'hi') AS double_replacement FROM test_strings;
SELECT replaceAll(haystack, '!', '') AS trimmed_haystack FROM (SELECT 'hello world!' AS haystack) sub;
SELECT replaceAll(haystack, 'o', 'oo') FROM (SELECT haystack FROM test_strings ORDER BY id LIMIT 2) AS limited_haystack;
